userStories.title: Add complete() method to AgentAdapter interface
userStories.description: Add a one-shot LLM call method complete(prompt, options) to the AgentAdapter interface and implement it in ClaudeAdapter using claude -p CLI. Options: { maxTokens?, jsonMode?, model? }. Returns plain text string.
acceptanceCriteria: AgentAdapter interface has complete(prompt: string, options?: CompleteOptions): Promise<string>
ClaudeAdapter implements complete() using Bun.spawn(['claude', '-p', prompt, ...flags])
jsonMode option adds --output-format json flag
model option passes --model flag when provided
maxTokens option passes --max-tokens flag when provided
Non-zero exit or empty output throws a typed error
Unit tests cover success, jsonMode, model override, and error cases

userStories.title: Refactor classifier.ts to use adapter.complete() — drop @anthropic-ai/sdk
userStories.description: Replace the direct Anthropic SDK usage in src/analyze/classifier.ts with adapter.complete(). Remove @anthropic-ai/sdk from package.json dependencies entirely. The hardcoded model 'claude-haiku-4-20250514' should be resolved from config models.fast instead.
acceptanceCriteria: src/analyze/classifier.ts imports adapter instead of Anthropic SDK
adapter.complete() called with jsonMode: true for classification
Model resolved from config models.fast (not hardcoded)
@anthropic-ai/sdk removed from package.json dependencies
bun install reflects removal (lockfile updated)
nax analyse still classifies stories correctly
Unit tests mock adapter.complete() — no real API calls

userStories.title: Refactor llm.ts routing strategy to use adapter.complete()
userStories.description: Replace hardcoded Bun.spawn(['claude', ...]) in src/routing/strategies/llm.ts with adapter.complete(). The adapter instance should be resolved from the execution context or passed as a dependency.
acceptanceCriteria: src/routing/strategies/llm.ts no longer spawns 'claude' directly
Uses adapter.complete() for LLM-based routing decisions
Adapter resolved via dependency injection or context — not hardcoded
Behaviour identical: returns routing tier classification
Unit tests mock adapter.complete() for routing responses

userStories.title: Refactor interaction/plugins/auto.ts to use adapter.complete()
userStories.description: Replace hardcoded Bun.spawn(['claude', ...]) in src/interaction/plugins/auto.ts with adapter.complete(). This plugin handles auto-responses during interactive prompts.
acceptanceCriteria: src/interaction/plugins/auto.ts no longer spawns 'claude' directly
Uses adapter.complete() for generating auto-responses
Adapter resolved via dependency injection
Auto-response behaviour unchanged
Unit tests mock adapter.complete()

userStories.title: Refactor precheck to detect configured agent binary
userStories.description: Update src/precheck/checks-blockers.ts to check for the configured agent binary instead of hardcoding 'claude'. Support codex, opencode, gemini, and aider version checks. The check should read the configured agent from config and validate that binary exists and responds to --version.
acceptanceCriteria: Precheck reads agent from config (default: 'claude')
Supports binaries: claude, codex, opencode, gemini, aider
Each binary has its correct --version flag pattern
Missing binary returns a typed blocker with agent name in message
Claude path unchanged — no regression on existing behaviour
Unit tests cover each agent type and missing-binary case

userStories.title: Remove hardcoded claude-sonnet-4-5 model fallbacks
userStories.description: Replace all hardcoded 'claude-sonnet-4-5' fallback strings in src/agents/claude.ts, src/agents/claude-plan.ts, src/acceptance/fix-generator.ts, and src/acceptance/generator.ts with dynamic resolution from config models.balanced. This ensures model portability across agent types.
acceptanceCriteria: No hardcoded 'claude-sonnet-4-5' strings remain in src/agents/ or src/acceptance/
Model resolved from config.models.balanced at runtime
Fallback chain: config value -> adapter default -> throw if none configured
Existing routing behaviour unchanged (model still passed correctly to spawn)
Unit tests verify model resolution from config

userStories.title: Scaffold CodexAdapter implementing AgentAdapter
userStories.description: Create a Codex adapter at src/agents/adapters/codex.ts that implements AgentAdapter interface with execute(), complete(), and binary detection. execute() uses 'codex -q --prompt <text>' for headless sessions. complete() uses the same for one-shot calls. Register adapter in the adapter factory.
acceptanceCriteria: src/agents/adapters/codex.ts implements AgentAdapter interface
execute() spawns codex with headless flags
complete() spawns codex -q --prompt for one-shot response
Bun.which('codex') used for binary detection
Adapter factory returns CodexAdapter when config agent is 'codex'
Integration tests skip if codex binary not installed (Bun.which guard)
Unit tests mock Bun.spawn for all methods
